north_america.name: North America
north_america.description: Diverse landscapes from Arctic tundra to tropical beaches, modern cities, vast prairies, and mountain ranges.

north_america.name: Pacific Northwest
north_america.description: Rainforests, volcanoes, coastal fog, evergreen forests, and rugged Pacific coastline.

north_america.name: American Southwest
north_america.description: Desert landscapes, canyons, Native American cultural influences, adobe architecture, and vibrant sunsets.

north_america.name: Northeastern US
north_america.description: Colonial architecture, autumn foliage, urban skylines, and coastal New England charm.

north_america.name: Southern US
north_america.description: Plantation homes, bayous, barbecue culture, Spanish moss, and warm hospitality.

north_america.name: Canadian Prairies
north_america.description: Golden wheat fields, ranching culture, vast horizons, and harsh winters.

north_america.name: Mexican Culture
north_america.description: Colorful colonial cities, Aztec pyramids, vibrant markets, and desert oases.

south_america.name: South America
south_america.description: Amazon rainforest, Andean peaks, tango culture, Carnival celebrations, and diverse indigenous heritage.

south_america.name: Andean Region
south_america.description: Incan ruins, high-altitude plateaus, llama herders, colorful woven textiles, and colonial churches.

south_america.name: Amazon Basin
south_america.description: Dense rainforest, indigenous tribes, exotic wildlife, river villages, and shamanic traditions.

south_america.name: Pampas Region
south_america.description: Endless grasslands, gaucho culture, cattle ranches, and dramatic thunderstorms.

south_america.name: Brazilian Culture
south_america.description: Carnival parades, samba rhythms, Copacabana beaches, and tropical exuberance.

south_america.name: Patagonia
south_america.description: Glaciers, fjords, penguins, rugged mountains, and windswept plains.

europe.name: Western Europe
europe.description: Medieval castles, Renaissance art, Gothic cathedrals, wine regions, and cultural sophistication.

europe.name: Northern Europe
europe.description: Viking heritage, fjords, midnight sun, hygge lifestyle, and minimalist design.

europe.name: Eastern Europe
europe.description: Byzantine churches, communist architecture, folk traditions, and resilient spirit.

europe.name: Southern Europe
europe.description: Mediterranean villas, olive groves, passionate culture, and ancient ruins.

europe.name: British Isles
europe.description: Stone circles, thatched cottages, afternoon tea, and literary heritage.

europe.name: Scandinavia
europe.description: Nordic mythology, sauna culture, design innovation, and natural beauty.

europe.name: Mediterranean
europe.description: Azure seas, whitewashed buildings, fresh seafood, and leisurely pace of life.

asia.name: East Asia
asia.description: Ancient temples, tea ceremonies, calligraphy, cherry blossoms, and technological innovation.

asia.name: South Asia
asia.description: Spice markets, Mughal palaces, yoga traditions, colorful festivals, and spiritual diversity.

asia.name: Southeast Asia
asia.description: Tropical islands, rice terraces, Buddhist temples, street food culture, and vibrant textiles.

asia.name: Central Asia
asia.description: Silk Road caravans, nomadic yurts, mountain passes, and ancient trading cities.

asia.name: Middle East
asia.description: Desert oases, minarets, bazaars, calligraphy art, and rich storytelling traditions.

africa.name: North Africa
africa.description: Ancient pyramids, Mediterranean ports, desert caravans, and Islamic architecture.

africa.name: West Africa
africa.description: Tribal masks, kente cloth, drum circles, and vibrant marketplaces.

africa.name: East Africa
africa.description: Savanna wildlife, Maasai warriors, spice islands, and Great Rift Valley.

africa.name: Central Africa
africa.description: Dense rainforests, pygmy culture, gorilla habitats, and equatorial climate.

africa.name: Southern Africa
africa.description: Safari landscapes, wine estates, mining towns, and diverse wildlife reserves.

oceania.name: Oceania
oceania.description: Coral reefs, Aboriginal dreamtime, Maori culture, and island paradises.

oceania.name: Pacific Islands
oceania.description: Volcanic islands, palm-fringed beaches, traditional navigation, and Polynesian heritage.

oceania.name: Australian Outback
oceania.description: Red desert, Aboriginal rock art, kangaroos, and vast cattle stations.

oceania.name: New Zealand
oceania.description: Fiordlands, Maori hangi, sheep farms, and adventure sports culture.

polar_arctic.name: Arctic Regions
polar_arctic.description: Ice floes, polar bears, Inuit culture, northern lights, and extreme cold adaptation.

caribbean.name: Caribbean
caribbean.description: Crystal waters, reggae music, colonial forts, tropical fruits, and island festivals.
